message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorFontColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #777777
  BoxBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor Caller
participant "ServeurDynamease" as SD
participant "Asterisk" as AST
actor CalledDynamease as CD

Caller -> SD : clickButton
activate SD

SD -> SD : Verification

SD -> AST : Create conference room
activate AST
AST --> SD
deactivate AST

SD --> Caller : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number

SD --> CD : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number_with information_of_the _caller

Caller -> AST : Call_With_Trunk_Number
activate AST

CD -> AST : Call_With_Trunk_Number

... When the communication is ending ...

AST --> SD : communication ending
deactivate AST
deactivate SD

@enduml
```
